creator: tobez@plab.ku.dk
text:
New version of mathopd has been released.

Fix: 

Cheers,
Anton.--gcm9WTWFeVJyFkm8mnJ8B52LNVL3dJzZy8Mapn8qmDPFTJYe
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

diff -ruN mathopd132/Makefile mathopd/Makefile
--- mathopd132/Makefile	Sun Dec 26 17:17:19 1999
+++ mathopd/Makefile	Sat Feb 19 21:35:45 2000
@@ -1,19 +1,17 @@
 # New ports collection makefile for:    mathopd HTTPD
-# Version required:     1.3
+# Version required:     1.3pl4
 # Date created:         Sun Oct 31 1999
 # Whom:                 tobez@plab.ku.dk
 #
 # $FreeBSD: ports/www/mathopd/Makefile,v 1.2 1999/12/22 21:32:43 steve Exp $
 #
 
-DISTNAME=	mathopd-1.3pl2
+DISTNAME=	mathopd-1.3pl4
 CATEGORIES=	www
 MASTER_SITES=	http://mathop.diva.nl/dist/ \
 		ftp://ftp.prima.eu.org/pub/mirrored_files/mathop.diva.nl/
 
 MAINTAINER=	tobez@plab.ku.dk
-
-WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/mathopd
 
 post-install:
 	@${INSTALL_DATA} ${FILESDIR}/mathopd.conf.sample ${PREFIX}/etc
diff -ruN mathopd132/files/md5 mathopd/files/md5
--- mathopd132/files/md5	Sun Dec 26 17:17:19 1999
+++ mathopd/files/md5	Sat Feb 19 21:36:35 2000
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (mathopd-1.3pl2.tar.gz) = 9bd5eda6011f3ba8f6fb43a94e21e61b
+MD5 (mathopd-1.3pl4.tar.gz) = 7c6a1d10124bba4eee3b5d8fb49d479d
How-To-Repeat: Commit it (see the `Fix' part of this report).  :-)
